AaP3Km Successful GLOBE Photo Overlap Explorer v004

All 376 agreement examples baked into this portable HTML: searchable list, map markers, zoom-to selection, gray background option, 100 m footprint, photo wedges, and exact SSU overlap dots.

Successful overlap examples

This file embeds the 376 agree examples from GLOBE_photo_100m_square_SSU_overlap_summary.csv plus exact SSU overlap pairs for these selected examples. No file upload is needed for browsing these successful overlaps.
